summary: Deterministic report packet tests cover explicit-only cost and cache telemetry, blocked review variant reason payloads, and held-out/full-gate scenario telemetry lifting.

covered: Report packets do not infer cost or runtime identity from command text or stdout/stderr observations; they preserve explicit mode and scenario telemetry only.
Cache-token and budget-attribution fields are preserved and aggregated when explicit mode or scenario telemetry emits machine-readable fields.
Blocked review variants preserve machine-readable reason codes and a concrete reason inside product-owned blocked packets.
Held-out and full-gate mode runs lift explicit scenario telemetry into mode summaries and overall report telemetry.
notClaimed: This bundle does not prove provider pricing correctness; it proves only explicit field preservation and non-inference.
This bundle does not claim that Cautilus currently writes report-input command observations while executing adapter-defined report mode commands.

outputSummary: buildReportPacket aggregates mode telemetry and scenario summaries
buildReportPacket surfaces provider rate-limit contamination in report reasons
build-report-packet defaults to report-input.json and report.json inside the active run
report input and generated report match the checked-in schemas
report reason classification surfaces provider rate-limit contamination
report reason classification does not treat resultId digits as a provider rate-limit signal

checkedInEvidence.proves: Cost, provider, model, cache, and budget-attribution telemetry are explicit-only and aggregated from structured telemetry fields.
Scenario-level telemetry preserves cache-token breakdown, cost, token, retry, and tool-call attribution fields.
Report mode summaries carry machine-readable reason codes and warnings when persisted artifacts show provider contamination.
Review variant execution packets preserve blocked status, reason codes, concrete reason payloads, partial success, and explicit numeric telemetry.

tests: buildReportPacket aggregates mode telemetry and scenario summaries
buildReportPacket surfaces provider rate-limit contamination in report reasons
checkedInEvidence.proves: The JavaScript report builder mirrors report telemetry aggregation, scenario telemetry lifting, and contamination reason behavior.

decision.reason: The checked-in Go and JavaScript tests exercise the explicit telemetry contract, cache-token preservation, blocked reason payload contract, and mode/scenario telemetry lifting asserted by these reporting claims.
